nasb.text: He made him king over Gilead, over the Ashurites, over Jezreel, over Ephraim, and over Benjamin, even over all Israel.

esv.text: and he made him king over Gilead and the Ashurites and Jezreel and Ephraim and Benjamin and all Israel.

cnv.text: 並且立了他作王，統治基列、亞書利、耶斯列、以法蓮、便雅憫和以色列眾人。

ccb.text: 立他为王统治基列、亚书利、耶斯列、以法莲、便雅悯和以色列其余的地方。
